sections.paragraph:
verb לכנות

to name; nickname; entitle; denominate

verb כונה

be named; entitled; nicknamed

verb להתכנות

be named, go by the name of; to call oneself (by another name)

verb להכין

to prepare, make ready; establish

verb הוכן

be prepared, made ready; be provided; be established

verb לכנות (>>עינה)

to name; nickname; entitle; denominate

masculine noun

pad, pedestal, mount, mounting

adverb

yes, so, aye, yea

adjective

true, sincere, honest, frank, outspoken, openhearted, genuine, heartfelt, hearty, ingenuous, open, wholehearted
